name: Oysters on the Half Shell with Red Wine Vinegar Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender puree the shallots with the red wine vinegar until smooth. Set aside.
2. Shuck the oysters.
3. Keep the shucked oysters covered with a wet towel in the refrigerator for up to an hour.
4. Spoon about 1 teaspoon of sauce over each oyster, covering them lightly.
5. Serve immediately.
